title: Koktel
description: UX Writing and UI design for Koktel. Brand voice definition, user flows, and interface design.

process.challenge: Koktel needed a clear brand voice and a cohesive interface that consistently expressed its personality across all touchpoints.
process.approach: I developed the UX Writing system — defining the voice, tone, and language patterns — then designed the user flows and UI, ensuring alignment between copy and visuals.
process.results: Documented UX Writing system and implemented UI with aligned verbal and visual identity.
